Replace these placeholder files with your real certificate images while keeping the same filenames:

- oracle-generative-ai.svg
- oracle-oci-data-science.svg
- bytexl-dsa.svg
- nptel-iot.svg
- nptel-cloud.svg
- hackerrank-java-basic.svg

You can replace SVG with JPG/PNG too, but then update the image paths in src/components/Certifications.jsx.
